mission.title: distribution: [v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default
mission.description: [v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default. Requested by 34+ users.

steps.title: Check current distribution deployment
steps.description:
Verify your distribution version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
helm list -n distribution 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working distribution installation.

steps.title: Review distribution configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant distribution configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
kubectl get configmap -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=distribution
```
I thought I would update my registries to the `3.0.0-alpha.1` for testing and I am seeing that it looks like the registry is trying to connect to an endpoint for tracing but I have not configured anything.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default
steps.description:
Cherry pick PR #4047 to release/2.8 branch.
```yaml
2024/01/31 21:13:05 traces export: Post "https://localhost:4318/v1/traces": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused
2024/01/31 21:13:10 traces export: Post "https://localhost:4318/v1/traces": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused
2024/01/31 21:13:15 traces export: Post "https://localhost:4318/v1/traces": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused
2024/01/31 21:13:42 traces export: Post "https://localhost:4318/v1/traces": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused
2024/01/31 21:25:22 traces export: Post "https://localhost:4318/v1/traces": dial tcp
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
kubectl get events -n distribution --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the linked issue and PR for the community-verified solution.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with distribution installed or the issue environment reproducible.
